title: Experience
text:
Professional Experience

Data Analyst | FPInnovations
Vancouver, British Columbia | November 2022 - August 2025

Performance Optimization: Engineered and deployed scalable ETL data pipelines (Python, SQL, Azure) across 4 flagship initiatives, drastically cutting client onboarding timelines from 6 months to 4 weeks.
Predictive Analytics: Architected and deployed end-to-end machine learning anomaly detection models, successfully actively mitigating 30+ operational anomalies per site and safeguarding business continuity.
Process Automation: Spearheaded the transition to digitalized reporting architectures spanning 10 cross-functional teams, reclaiming 300+ annual hours of manual engineering effort.
DevOps & CI/CD: Championed Azure DevOps integration and robust CI/CD pipelines, elevating team-wide code quality and deployment velocity through structured code reviews.
Data Strategy: Wrangled and synthesized massive heterogeneous datasets to surface actionable intelligence, directly influencing executive strategic initiatives.



Sales and Logistics Analyst | Interfor
(Formerly Sales Assistant)  Burnaby, British Columbia | November 2021 - November 2022

Business Intelligence: Designed dynamic Tableau dashboards tracking critical logistics KPIs across 8 VMI frameworks, reducing operational lead times by 12% YoY.
Revenue Growth: Conducted rigorous market trend variance analysis that identified key growth opportunities, heavily contributing to a 23% YoY revenue surge.
Operations Management: Administered and optimized high-value supply contracts ($4M/month run-rate) by leveraging ERP data (LumberTrack) for precise demand forecasting.

title: Golf Swing Analyzer MVP
text:
Upload a prerecorded video of your golf swing to receive real-time posture analysis. 100% Private: all processing is done locally in your browser using Google's MediaPipe Vision API. You can check out the repo here: https://github.com/Eric-Wong97/golf-swing-analyzer

title: Consumer Tech Retail Forecasting Dashboard
text:
An end-to-end retail analytics pipeline — from raw transactional data in
        MongoDB through exploratory analysis and Holt-Winters
        forecasting to this interactive front-end. The live
        R Shiny dashboard (source below) adds drill-down filters,
        ARIMA/ETS model selection, and a real-time MongoDB query preview.
      
      
        R / Shiny
        MongoDB
        Forecasting
        EDA
        Retail Analytics

        Holt-Winters Forecast — Jan–Jun 2025
        Triple Exponential Smoothing (α=0.3, β=0.1, γ=0.4)
      
      
    
    
      Forecasting Methodology
      
        Revenue is modelled with Holt-Winters triple exponential smoothing (period = 12 months),
        which decomposes the signal into level, trend, and seasonality components. The 95% prediction
        interval widens with forecast horizon, reflecting accumulated uncertainty. In the full
        R Shiny app, forecast::ets() automatically selects the optimal
        error/trend/seasonal variant (additive vs multiplicative vs damped) via AIC.
      
      
        —RMSE
        —MAPE
        6Month Horizon
        95%Confidence
